title: HastyHoppers
body:
⚡ HastyHoppers — Fully Configurable Hopper Speeds
Tired of slow hoppers? HastyHoppers lets you fully customize hopper transfer speeds with a simple in-game GUI.
## 🛠 Features


Easy GUI: Run /hastyhoppers in-game to open the settings menu

Custom Hopper Speed: Change how often hoppers transfer items using Cooldown Ticks

Adjust Transfer Amount: Set how many items move per transfer cycle with Items Per Transfer

Per-World Settings: Each world saves its own hopper configuration

Flexible Values: Supports values from 1–64

## ⚙ How It Works


Cooldown Ticks = how often hoppers transfer items

Items Per Transfer = how many item moves happen each transfer cycle


Lower cooldowns + higher transfer amounts = faster hoppers
## 📦 Vanilla Comparison
Vanilla Minecraft hoppers move 1 item every 8 ticks by default.
With HastyHoppers, you can fine-tune performance to fit your world or server.
## Command:
/hastyhoppers — Open the hopper settings GUI in your world.

![The HastyHoppers GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83a37200a451caf46f25dce5581369b731ce581d_0.webp)
